start.template:
MEMORY REFRESH: Re-read all instruction files.
1. Read AGENTS.md
2. Read GLOBAL_WORKFLOW.md
3. Read agents/ directory for all agent definitions
4. Read deployment.md
5. Read todo.md for current state
Then confirm you are ready as orchestrator.

lint.template:
Run linting on the codebase.
Detect file type:
- Python (.py): ruff check
- JS/TS (.js/.ts/.jsx/.tsx): biome check
{{command}}

format.template:
Format code:
- Python: ruff format
- JS/TS: biome format --write
{{command}}

typecheck.template:
Run type checking:
- Python: mypy
- JS/TS: tsc --noEmit
{{command}}

test.template:
Run tests:
- First run ./scripts/setup-dev.sh if exists
- Then pytest or npm test
{{command}}

ci.template:
Run full CI pipeline:
1. lint
2. format check
3. typecheck
4. tests
{{command}}

deploy.template:
DEPLOY: Execute deployment procedure from deployment.md.
1. Run all quality gates (lint, format, typecheck, test)
2. If all pass: docker compose build --no-cache -f ../Dockerfile && docker compose up -d
3. If any fail: report and stop
{{command}}

review.template:
CODE REVIEW: Launch code-reviewer agent.
The reviewer uses Minimax M2.5 model.
Review all uncommitted changes with severity-based findings.
Return structured verdict: APPROVED, ISSUES_FOUND, or DEBATE_NEEDED.
{{command}}
